name: Diaub
description: Diaub is a Jakobs sniper type built for a quicker cadence than most bolt action rifles. It retains the high-impact Jakobs feel but fires at a pace closer to a semi-auto, letting you place accurate follow-up shots with less downtime. Best suited to players who want precision without the slow rhythm of traditional sniping.
notes: A special Diaub branded with Gearbox was included with the Premiere Club pre-order bonus. Regular versions can drop from standard world loot sources.
